tasks.title: Tasks

bulk.archive_hint: Deletion is unavailable — tasks can only be archived. Restore from archive (Supervisor role or above).

tasks.empty_no_tasks_desc: Create the first task or wait for planned tasks from the system
tasks.error_desc: Check your connection and try again

taskDetail.report_empty_desc: Once the assignee completes the task and uploads a report, it will appear here
taskDetail.photo_required_missing: Photo is required but not attached
taskDetail.approve_dialog_desc: After approval the task will be closed. Comment is optional.
taskDetail.reject_dialog_desc: Task will be returned to the assignee for rework. Reason is required.
taskDetail.reject_reason_placeholder: Specify what needs to be fixed (min 10 chars)...
taskDetail.subtasks_empty_desc: Add subtasks to describe the execution steps
taskDetail.history_empty_desc: No events recorded for this task yet
taskDetail.transfer_dialog_desc: Select a new assignee. The task can be transferred when In progress or Paused.
taskDetail.archive_dialog_desc: Select the archive reason. The task will be hidden from the main list. It can be restored from the Archive section (Supervisor role or above).
taskDetail.status_override_dialog_desc: Force status change. NETWORK_OPS only. This action will be logged in audit.
taskDetail.status_override_justification_placeholde: Specify the reason for the status change (min 10 chars)...
taskDetail.not_found_desc: Task T-{id} does not exist or has been deleted
taskDetail.forbidden_desc: You do not have access to this task

taskForm.type_bonus_hint: Only available when an active goal exists
taskForm.assignment_permission_hint: Any eligible worker on shift can claim this task first
taskForm.chain_label: Chain: hand off to next assignee on completion
taskForm.chain_hint: After the current worker completes this task, it will automatically be created for the next assignee
taskForm.requires_photo_hint: Worker will not be able to complete without a photo report
taskForm.override_hint_disabled: Override is available to regional manager / network director / operator only
taskForm.override_justification_placeholder: State the reason for override (minimum 10 characters)...
taskForm.marketing_channel_hint: After task acceptance, the photo report will be sent to this channel
taskForm.cancel_confirm_message: All unsaved changes will be lost.
taskForm.toast_conflict: Task was modified by someone else — please refresh
taskForm.toast_error: Failed to save task. Please try again.
taskForm.forbidden_desc: Only supervisors, regional managers, and network directors can create tasks manually.
